title: Black Magnetic Dry Wipe Markers Whiteboard Pens with Eraser - 3 Pack
seller_info_text: Seal and Store UK VAT Registered
features: These Handy Dry Wipe Marker pens are New and come in a pack of 3 Black as per picture.
These Unique Marker pens are Magnetic and have a built in Eraser on the end.
Our pens are slimline and 11.5cm long so are ideal for carrying in your pocket.
Suitable for office, school or home use.
